status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched. Compliance oversight for the PDPPL is now via NCSA (secid:control/ncsa.gov.qa) rather than this legal-text portal — cited here as the legislative source per this repo's convention of registering laws under the publisher of record.

data.official_name: Law No. 13 of 2016 concerning Personal Data Privacy Protection
data.notes: Sets fines up to QAR 1M/5M. Compliance oversight now via the National Cyber Security Agency (NCSA).
